producer: demiurge RTSC M9 — Tier-2 recipe-as-record (§8.7 4-tier path, Tier 2) for the #1 dynamically-stable novel candidate h3cl (H3Cl Im-3m). Synthesis pressure pinned at 200.5 GPa by EOS (rtsc_h3cl_eos_im3m_20260524.json).
draft_note: EOS-pinned synthesis pressure (200.5 GPa) closes the hard blocker; demiurge-side Tier-2 recipe-as-record complete. Wet-lab partner details (Cl precursor, loading geometry, IRB) are outside demiurge scope by design (§8.3 boundary).
purpose: Cockpit-gate Tier-2 product: a typed, machine-readable synthesis+characterisation recipe for h3cl, handed to an external high-pressure (DAC) lab. demiurge clean-room emits the RECORD only; physical synthesis stays outside (§8.3 boundary). h3cl is the sole dynamically-stable (real-mode) novel candidate from the H3X group sweep.
boundary: demiurge clean-room (DESIGN.md D1): typed record + simulation + measurement-ingest allowed; physical DAC loading / laser heating / R(T) measurement = wet-lab partner. This file is the handoff artifact, NOT a synthesis run.
honest_scope_flag: h3cl is NOT an RTSC winner. Predicted Tc 123-140K is at HIGH PRESSURE (not ambient) and below the 270K target — it FAILS §8.9 gate-(b) (Tc>=270K ambient) by prediction alone. Value = (1) pipeline/measurement-grade validation, (2) publishable novel halide (group-17) superconductor DFT prediction, (3) first wet-lab-shaped RTSC handoff template.

structure_target.stability: dynamically stable — all real phonon modes at 6x6x6 q (contrast h3o/h3f/h3si imaginary modes). Confirms Im-3m is the synthesis target, not a metastable distortion.

composition_table_target.note: stoichiometric H3Cl. wt% from H=1.008, Cl=35.45 g/mol.

raw_material_purity_minima.Cl_source: NaCl 5N or HCl(anhydrous) 4N or Cl2 4N — partner choice; halogen handling per DAC lab SOP
raw_material_purity_minima.note: in-situ H3Cl formation from Cl source + excess H2 under pressure + laser heating is the expected route (direct H3Cl precursor is unstable at ambient).

synthesis_protocol_stubs.method: diamond anvil cell (DAC) + double-sided laser heating
synthesis_protocol_stubs.loading: Cl source crystal/film + H2 cryo-loaded (or H2 as pressure medium + reservoir) into DAC gasket hole
synthesis_protocol_stubs.pressure_GPa: 200.5 GPa at the Tc structure (celldm=5.65934 bohr) — pinned by EOS tstress sweep (rtsc_h3cl_eos_im3m_20260524.json, 7-point celldm scan, monotone 88 GPa @ a=6.10 -> 378 GPa @ a=5.30). Compress + anneal at ~200 GPa to reproduce predicted Tc 123-140K. Comparable regime to H3S 203K @ 150 GPa (DAC-accessible).
synthesis_protocol_stubs.heating: laser anneal ~1500-2500 K to overcome kinetic barrier to Im-3m formation, then quench-in-pressure
synthesis_protocol_stubs.in_situ: synchrotron XRD during compression to confirm Im-3m BCC lattice (a~2.995 A at ~200 GPa)
open_inputs: metastability/quench window (enthalpy vs decomposition Cl + 3/2 H2 — not yet run)

primary_3test: R(T) -> 0: 4-probe resistance, expect onset Tc ~123-140K AT SYNTHESIS PRESSURE (mu*=0.10) / ~109-127K (mu*=0.13)
Meissner: AC magnetic susceptibility chi(T,B), diamagnetic onset at Tc
Cp jump: specific-heat anomaly at Tc (DAC-compatible calorimetry, hard)
characterisation_protocol_stubs_post_syn.structure: in-situ XRD Im-3m confirmation + Raman/IR for H-stretch modes (omega_log~1350K = ~94 meV)
characterisation_protocol_stubs_post_syn.isotope: H->D substitution: expect Tc * sqrt(m_H/m_D) ~ Tc/1.41 shift (BCS isotope effect) — phonon-mediated confirmation

reproducibility_checklist: EOS-pinned target pressure documented before loading
>=3 independent DAC loadings at target P
isotope shift consistent with phonon-mediated SC
pressure release -> Tc/structure tracking (ambient-recovery test — expected to fail = high-P-only, documents the gate-(b) limit)
wet_lab_partner_options: high-pressure DAC groups (e.g. Carnegie/Hemley-lineage, Mainz/Eremets-lineage, HPSTAR) — RTSC hydride DAC standard
note: partner selection + IRB/safety = outside demiurge scope
honest_observations: EOS DONE (2026-05-24): synthesis pressure pinned at 200.5 GPa @ the Tc structure — the hard blocker is cleared, recipe is now pressure-executable. Remaining open: Cl precursor/loading (partner) + metastability/quench window.
h3cl 6q was under-converged (monotone lambda vs broadening); 8q (ubu-1) is the converged basis used here (Tc 123-140K).
high-pressure-only: ambient recovery expected to fail. This recipe validates the PIPELINE's wet-lab handoff shape, it does not claim an RTSC win.
Tc 140K @ high-P is a legitimate novel halide-superconductor prediction (no prior measured H3Cl high-P Tc) — publishable independent of RTSC goal.
next_steps_after_this_handoff: DONE: EOS pinned synthesis pressure 200.5 GPa (rtsc_h3cl_eos_im3m_20260524.json). Optional follow-up: enthalpy-vs-decomposition for metastability/quench window.
Tier 3 (§8.7): ingest any returned R(T)/Meissner/Cp as typed measurement record
Tier 4 (§8.7): falsifier dispatch -> 3-tier aggregate verdict (expect gate-(b) FAIL at ambient = honest)
compare against N5-funnel ambient candidates (SrAuH3/Mg2IrH6/RbTlH3, ubu-2 in-flight) which target <50 GPa
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1+2 preserved. Tc<270K + high-P framed as scientific finding (pipeline-validation candidate), not impossibility (@D d2). absorbed stays false: non-wet-lab gate-(b) (Tc>=270K ambient) not met by prediction.
citations: RTSC.md §9.15 (H3X group sweep — Cl FAIL above band)
Drozdov 2015 Nature 525:73 (H3S 203K @ 150 GPa — high-P hydride DAC precedent)
